category_sources: Official kmod README says kmod handles Linux kernel module insert, remove, list, properties, dependencies, and aliases.
source_facts.description says Linux kernel module handling.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading is kmod - Linux kernel module handling.
docs_sources: Official kmod README is in the git.kernel.org repository.
Official source tree contains a man directory for command documentation.
repo_sources: Official kmod README lists git.kernel.org as the official Git repository and GitHub as a mirror.
source_facts.homepage points to the git.kernel.org repository.
tags_sources: Official kmod README describes Linux kernel module operations and libkmod.
source_facts.executables include depmod, insmod, lsmod, modinfo, modprobe, rmmod.
